query:
SELECT id, payment_time, created_by, updated_by, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.payment_time') as raw_payment_time, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.paid_at') as raw_paid_at FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NULL LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, payment_time, created_by, updated_by, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.payment_time') as raw_payment_time FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;

SELECT id, payment_time, created_by, updated_by, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.payment_time') as raw_payment_time FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
